title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Amazon India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Amazon India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
